### LOCALE\_NAMES

所有支持的区域名称数组（按字母顺序排列）

```typescript
LOCALE_NAMES: readonly ["de-DE", "en-US", "es-ES", "fr-FR", "id-ID", "it-IT", "ja-JP", "ko-KR", "pt-BR", "ru-RU", "th-TH", "vi-VN", "zh-CN", "zh-HK", "zh-TW", "ms-MY"]
```
